item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested fourth manual gate, explicitly frames the first three incidents as the same repeated pattern of adding people after each error, and refuses making the new verifier a standing default. It moves upstream to field/rule/permission/system-validation root causes and proposes bounded emergency handling plus structural fixes such as system generation, strong validation, uniqueness/type checks, and removal of the temporary verifier after repair. It does not simply add another permanent manual review point."}
